resolvedConflicts.resolution: Never install graphify in this Spec-Driven project. socraticode stays MCP-only in .vscode/mcp.json (verified — no plugin install).
2026-05-09 — superpowers installed, 4 redundant standalone skills removed from .claude/skills/. Capabilities now provided by superpowers:* namespace.

Spec-Driven framework uses each in different phases — Phase 2.5/2.6 (ui-ux-pro-max), Phase 4 UI code (frontend-design), Phase 4 UX review (oiloil-ui-ux-guide). The general 'pick one' rule does not apply here.

resolvedConflicts.winner: context-mode + claude-mem (2-layer defense; skillpilot dropped — not publicly available)
resolvedConflicts.resolution: 2026-05-09 (re-scan) — user reported thrashing as project size grew. context-mode reduces tool-output drain; claude-mem reduces session-start governance-doc drain. skillpilot was originally proposed as a third layer but no public marketplace path exists (Powerbyte-internal); dropped from install set. Rule 28 priority ladder + Rule 26 contextual skill loading partially cover the orchestration role skillpilot would have played.
